description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a dark green body and a black, ribbed lid. The lid appears to be split into two hinged sections, each with a horizontal bar handle running across the top for easy opening. On the front and sides, there are prominent white recycling symbols, indicating its use for recyclable waste. The body is robust and industrial, with reinforced edges and a solid base, suitable for heavy-duty outdoor use. There are no visible wheels, suggesting it is designed to remain stationary. The overall construction is sturdy, with a hard, matte finish that resists weather and wear.
description: A large, green metal dumpster with a black, ribbed split lid and recycling symbols on the front and sides. It features sturdy construction and is designed for outdoor waste collection.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the black ribbed lid and the solid, unmarked back panel of the dumpster.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the recycling symbol and the side profile of the split lid, with the handle bar visible.
description_view_2: The front view highlights two recycling symbols and the full width of the split, ribbed lid with the handle bar across the top.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the recycling symbol and the side profile of the lid and handle.
attribute_lid_type: split, hinged, ribbed plastic lid with two sections and a horizontal bar handle; no visible locking mechanism
attribute_handle_design: one long horizontal bar handle across the top front edge of the lid, metal
